name: Rahul S.
text: Authentic products and great guidance. Best supplement store in Bibwewadi. I've been buying here for over a year and never had a single authenticity issue.

name: Priya D.
text: Bought whey and creatine here, results have been amazing. The owner gives honest advice without pushing expensive stuff you don't need.

name: Aniket M.
text: Always have sealed originals at competitive prices. WhatsApp ordering is so convenient — message and they have everything ready for pickup same day.

name: Sneha K.
text: Got my ON Gold Standard whey at the best price in Bibwewadi. Super knowledgeable and helpful. My go-to store for every supplement purchase.
